hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm\s+-rf\s+/|sudo\s+|chmod\s+777|:\(\)\{|--no-verify|--force)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous or bypass command detected' && exit 2 || exit 0

PreToolUse.description: 阻止危险命令和 hook 绕过标志（--no-verify、--force）

PostToolUse.description: 写入或编辑文件后自动格式化并运行 lint 检查

hooks.command: {{BUILD_CMD}} 2>&1 | tail -5 && {{TEST_CMD}} 2>&1 | tail -10 || echo 'WARNING: 构建或测试检查失败'

Stop.description: 会话结束时验证构建通过且测试全部通过
